SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-03-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:07am
Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Caused called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Mahmoud Larizadeh appears with counsel Jill Bates-Moore. Respondent, Ronnie Gaynor appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Renne.

10:49am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
